steps.title: Connect verb and object
steps.content: The sentence says the review board "gathers to" do something. The blank supplies the verb before the embedded question "which sites to add next." A verb should connect directly to its object without punctuation between them.

steps.title: Remove disruptive punctuation
steps.content:
• Choice A: A comma after the verb incorrectly separates "select" from its object.
  • Choice B: A colon is not licensed because "gathers to select" is not an independent clause.
  • Choice C: A semicolon cannot join "gathers to select" to the dependent wording that follows.
The answer is D.
